articles.summary: A third of the Congressional Black Caucus could lose seats amid redistricting fight. As many as 19 members of the Congressional Black Caucus -- almost a third of its membership -- are at risk of losing their seats through the 2028 cycle.
articles.description: As many as 19 members of the Congressional Black Caucus -- almost a third of its membership -- are at risk of losing their seats through the 2028 cycle.
articles.author: Juhi Doshi, Hannah Demissie
